prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `712bf12e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_712bf12e` end to end. The rule is: each bottom-row red seed greedily moves `up` through `0`s; if `up` is blocked it moves `right` through `0`s; it stops if neither move is possible or once it reaches the top row.

The Sonnet summary file had no entry. The Opus hint was corrected and effectively discarded as-is, because it omitted two behaviors required by the official examples: repeated same-row right shifts and immediate stopping at row `0`. I recorded that in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_712bf12e/notes.md). The generator matches the task family by explicitly sampling bottom-row seeds, adding blocker cells that force the greedy traces, then scattering extra gray fragments away from the traced path union so the output rule stays unchanged. No new primitive was added.

Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced 1000 examples, generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the preview sheet. Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_712bf12e/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_712bf12e/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_712bf12e/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_712bf12e/notes.md). Generated outputs are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/712bf12e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/712bf12e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/712bf12e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/712bf12e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/712bf12e/previews/preview_03.png).
